scenarios.name: 🏏 IPL Match at Chinnaswamy
scenarios.description: RCB home game at M. Chinnaswamy Stadium. Expect 35,000+ crowd movement around MG Road, Indiranagar, and Koramangala from 4 PM onwards.

scenarios.name: 🌧️ Heavy Monsoon Downpour
scenarios.description: IMD orange alert for Bengaluru. Heavy rainfall expected across all zones. Risk of flooding in low-lying areas like Bellandur and Silk Board underpasses.

scenarios.name: 🚧 ORR Blocked at Marathahalli
scenarios.description: Major accident blocks 2 lanes of ORR near Marathahalli bridge. Traffic diverted through Whitefield and Bellandur inner roads.

scenarios.name: 🚇 Namma Metro Strike
scenarios.description: Metro services suspended across Purple and Green lines. All metro commuters diverted to buses and private vehicles.

scenarios.name: 🎉 School Holiday (Dasara)
scenarios.description: All schools closed for Dasara vacation. Reduced morning congestion in school zones, but increased recreational traffic in commercial areas.

scenarios.name: ⛈️🏏 Rain + IPL Double Whammy
scenarios.description: Heavy rain during an IPL match at Chinnaswamy. Worst-case scenario for central Bengaluru traffic.
